name: A-LIGN
description: A-LIGN — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool for developers. Specializes in Compliance Auditing.

seo.title: A-LIGN Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete A-LIGN analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec.

review.verdict: Best for vulnerability scanning in ci/cd. A-LIGN offers custom pricing.
pros: Integrates into CI/CD for developer-friendly security
cons: False positives require developer triage time

lock_in.reason: Audit firm services are portable but certifications are relationship-based

transparency.reason: Custom pricing via sales, scope-based quotes

developer_experience.reason: Audit service, not a developer API/SDK
